quest.0219C9D8447C8936.quest_desc.original:
The &2Timedoor Projector&r is a crude device that can open up timedoors for travel!

Sneak to place it on the ground then insert a &aLocation Card&r into it, or use a location card on the item while in your inventory.

Once a location card is inserted and you have enough &bChronon&r, you can open a portal door.

This is done one of two ways: non-sneaking use from your hand, or when receiving a redstone signal in block mode.
quest.0219C9D8447C8936.quest_desc.translation:
&2時空門投影儀&r是一種基礎裝置，可以開啟時空門來進行傳送。

潛行時右鍵可將它置於地上，再插入&a傳送點卡片&r；也可以在物品欄中，游標持著卡片，對投影儀點擊右鍵放入。

插入卡片後，只要你有足夠的&b時空粒子&r，就能開啟時空門。

可透過兩種方式啟動：手持狀態下直接右鍵使用（非潛行），或置於地面上時，給予它紅石訊號。

quest.056492E163706EC5.quest_desc.original:
The &aDislocator&r can be used to store a teleport location by Sneak + Right-clicking with it in the world.

Once stored, simply Right-click to teleport to that stored location, up to 32 times.

&aUn-bound Dislocators&r can be set then placed onto a &aDislocator Pedestal&r to act as waystones to teleport you places. Using the pedestal doesn't use durability!
quest.056492E163706EC5.quest_desc.translation:
&a傳送符咒&r可在世界中潛行並點擊右鍵，儲存一個傳送位置。

儲存後只要點擊右鍵，即可傳送到該位置，最多可使用 32 次。

&a未綁定的傳送符咒&r可先設定位置，再放到&a傳送符咒基座&r上作為傳送錨點。使用基座不會消耗耐久！

quest.066B47D2AB72355C.quest_desc.original: This dungeon spawns at around x:512, z:512.
quest.066B47D2AB72355C.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於 x:512, z:512 附近。

quest.087D1FBAE8A425C0.quest_desc.translation:
透過傳送核心的力量，你可以透過《&6通用機械&r》建立自己的&d傳送門&r，
在基地各區快速移動，甚至跨維度行動！

要建造它，你需要 1 個&d傳送機&r，與 9 個&b傳送框架&r。
搭好後先為傳送機供電，再開啟介面設定頻率名稱。命名完成後記得按下勾選按鈕！

&e備註&r：製作這些裝置，需要&b力場子注能方塊&r的&6世界引擎升級&r。
{@pagebreak}
其他傳送機都會看到這個頻率；你可以再建一組傳送機並選擇相同頻率，讓兩者互相連線。

{image:ftb:textures/quests/mekanism/portalframe.png width:100 height:100 align:center}
{@pagebreak}
&d便攜傳送器&r可讓你存取所有傳送機；只要有能量，就能立即傳送到任一傳送機！

手持並使用它，會顯示你的頻率清單。選擇目標後按下傳送即可！

quest.094A534C72917405.quest_desc.original: This dungeon spawns in the lower parts of the &bOcean&r ring.
quest.094A534C72917405.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於&b海洋&r環帶的較低處。

quest.094A534C72917405.title.translation: 找到一座&b冰霜蜘蛛巢穴

quest.13C8B2286F5184C7.quest_desc.original: When charged, using the &3Teleport Staff&r will teleport you in the direction you are looking, up to 100 blocks away.
quest.13C8B2286F5184C7.quest_desc.translation: 當&3傳送法杖&r內部有足夠能量時，使用它可以將你傳送至你面朝的方向最多 100 格遠。

quest.165A1B6F56051FA6.quest_desc.original:
&eTempad&r is a teleportation mod that uses special temporary portals called timedoors to travel between locations.

You've already gotten started with the &eTempad&r mod by making the &6Chronon Generator&r and &aChronon Cell&r.

&aLocation Cards&r are the next step, and can be used to register location data for use in other devices such as the &2Timedoor Projector&r or &6Tempad&r.

These can be stored in a &aWallet&r to keep your inventory clean.
quest.165A1B6F56051FA6.quest_desc.translation:
&e時空平板&r模組是一套傳送系統，透過名為時空門的特殊暫時傳送門在各地點間移動。

你已透過製作&6時空粒子產生器&r與&a時空粒子單元&r，開始接觸&e時空平板&r模組。

下一步是製作&a傳送點卡片&r，可用來記錄座標資料，供&2時空門投影儀&r或&6時空平板&r等裝置使用。

這些卡片可以存放在&a卡片錢包&r中，讓你的物品欄更整潔。

quest.1E061D2E5C560867.quest_desc.original:
The &cChesed Arena&r is a massive structure found in the &eEnd&r ring.

This arena comes with its own boss fight!
quest.1E061D2E5C560867.quest_desc.translation:
&c『慈悲』競技場&r是能夠在&e終界&r環帶中找到的大型結構。

此競技場內有一場專屬的魔王戰！

quest.214D210F200CD11F.quest_desc.original:
The &dTime Twister&r records important events such as deaths or changing dimensions on a timeline. You can then teleport to the exact location of these timeline events, provided you have enough &bChronon&r.

Which events are recorded can be configured via the Time Twister's interface.
quest.214D210F200CD11F.quest_desc.translation:
&d時空扭曲器&r會在時間線上記錄重要事件，例如死亡或變換維度。

只要有足夠的&b時空粒子&r，你就能傳送至這些事件的精確位置。

要記錄哪些事件，可在時空扭曲器介面中進行設定。

quest.21A521011401074F.quest_desc.original: This dungeon spawns in the &7Deepslate&r and &cNetherrack&r rings.
quest.21A521011401074F.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於&7深板岩&r和&c地獄岩&r環帶。

quest.2D20EDB447787183.quest_desc.original:
While you can use &ebelts&r as an automatic sidewalk and &eweighted ejectors&r to fling yourself, there are more sophisticated methods of travel around the different sections of your base using the &6Create&r mod. Namely: &6Hypertubes&r!

Single or dual direction &bhypertube paths&r can be made by placing down &aHypertube Entrance Blocks&r, then clicking with some &aHyper&mlink&r&atube Blocks&r to extend out to a separate point. You can place down hypertube blocks to set up connection points for longer distances.

&7&oAny resemblance to Ficsit technologies current or previous is coincidental.
quest.2D20EDB447787183.quest_desc.translation:
雖然你可以把&e輸送帶&r當作自動步道，或用&e彈射置物台&r將自己彈出去，
但要在基地各區之間移動，&6動力機械&r還有更進階的方法：&6超級管道&r！

你可以先放置&a超級管道入口方塊&r，再用&a超級管道方塊&r延伸路線，建立單向或雙向的&b超級管道通道&r。也可在途中加設節點，串接更長距離。

&7&o如與 Ficsit 現行或過往技術雷同，純屬巧合。

quest.2E53319ED51DC7C8.quest_desc.original: You wouldn't believe it, but this dungeon spawns in the &eEnd&r ring.
quest.2E53319ED51DC7C8.quest_desc.translation: 或許難以置信，但此地牢會出現於&e終界&r環帶。

quest.3A43CCB33A024711.quest_desc.original:
The &6Workstation&r serves as an in-world &eTempad&r device.

You must dock a &6Tempad&r on it for it to function, granting the Workstation its functionalities as well as the &dTime Twister's&r timeline ability if installed.

It comes with more options and more configurations such as keeping the timedoor open longer, as well the ability to install optional upgrades on your tempad.
{@pagebreak}
The &dPlayer Teleport Upgrade&r allows your &6Tempad&r to discover players equipped with an active &aLocation Broadcaster&r or &dScreening Device&r.
quest.3A43CCB33A024711.quest_desc.translation:
&6工作站&r可作為放置於世界上的&e時空平板&r裝置。

你必須先將&6時空平板&r放上底座才可啟用，工作站會提供自身功能；若已安裝&d時空扭曲器&r，也能使用其時間線功能。

它提供更多選項與設定，例如讓時空門維持更久，也能為時空平板安裝額外升級。
{@pagebreak}
&d玩家傳送升級&r可讓你的&6時空平板&r，偵測到已啟用&a傳送點廣播器&r或&d篩選裝置&r的玩家。

quest.3B9DB4204A7CC6CD.quest_desc.original:
The &2Timedoor Marker&r is placed on the ground to mark a specific location in the world.

Right-clicking it opens an interface that allows you to configure its display name, color, and access settings.

The &6Chronomark&r is an upgraded version which allows for more customization options.
quest.3B9DB4204A7CC6CD.quest_desc.translation:
&2時空門標記器&r可放置在地面上，用來標記世界中的特定位置。

對它點擊右鍵可開啟介面，設定顯示名稱、顏色與存取權限。

&6時空標記&r是進階版本，提供更多自訂選項。

quest.3B9E10A560C565CC.quest_desc.original:
&aTeleporters&r from the &6Simple Teleporters&r can be used to set up quick teleport pads within the world.

&dEnder Shards&r can be Sneak + Right-clicked on a &aTeleporter&r to store its location data, then you can install the Shard into another &aTeleporter&r.

Once done, you can Sneak on top of the &aTeleporter&r to teleport!
quest.3B9E10A560C565CC.quest_desc.translation:
使用《&6簡易傳送器&r》的&a傳送器&r，可在世界中建立快速傳送點。

手持&d終界碎片&r，對&a傳送器&r潛行並點擊右鍵可儲存其位置資料，再把碎片放進另一台&a傳送器&r。

設定完成後，站上&a傳送器&r並按下潛行即可傳送！

quest.3CFDFD0BA7D30118.quest_desc.original:
In &6Stoneblock 4&r, the world is generated in rings!

You spawn into a pre-generated stone ring that extends out about 712 blocks. Each subsequent ring only extends out 512 blocks.
{@pagebreak}
The rings are in this order:

1. &3Stone&r
2. &7Deepslate&r
3. &cNether&r
4. &eEnd&r
5. &dTwilight Forest&r (Maze Stone)
6. &bOcean&r (Mossy Cobblestone)
7. &zVoid Chasms&r (Otherrock, with Skystone in the upper layer)
{@pagebreak}

{image:ftb:textures/quests/worldgen_rings.png width:300 height:300 align:center}
quest.3CFDFD0BA7D30118.quest_desc.translation:
在&6《只有石頭的世界 4》&r中，世界生成分為好幾個環帶！

你的重生點是一個預先生成好的石頭環帶（大約半經 712 格方塊內）。

其餘每個環帶都只會向外延伸 512 格方塊遠。
{@pagebreak}
環帶的順序如下：

1. &3石頭&r
2. &7深板岩&r
3. &c地獄&r
4. &e終界&r
5. &d暮光森林&r（迷宮石）
6. &b海洋&r（青苔鵝卵石）
7. &d虛空斷層&r（世界石，上面幾層為隕石）
{@pagebreak}

{image:ftb:textures/quests/worldgen_rings.png width:300 height:300 align:center}

quest.4032C8BD158D1776.quest_desc.original:
&dWarp Scrolls&r from &6Ars Nouveau&r have two different uses.

When Sneak + Right-clicked, the scroll will store your location data for future use. The scroll can used to teleport you back to that spot, consuming the scroll.

Instead, you can create a portal frame out of &aSourcestone&r and throw the scroll in to create a one-way portal!

&eNote&r: &aWarp Scrolls&r require the &bTwilight Forest&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r to craft.
{@pagebreak}
&dStabilized Warp Scrolls&r can also be used to store your location, then when used on a block, it opens up a temporary portal for you.
quest.4032C8BD158D1776.quest_desc.translation:
《&6新生魔藝&r》的&d折躍卷軸&r有兩種用途。

潛行並點擊右鍵時，卷軸會儲存你目前的位置資料。之後可消耗該卷軸，把你傳回這個地點。

你也可以用&a魔源石&r搭建門框，將卷軸丟入其中，建立單向傳送門！

&e備註&r：製作&a折躍卷軸&r需要&b暮光森林&r的&6世界引擎升級&r。
{@pagebreak}
&d穩定化折躍卷軸&r也能儲存位置；對方塊使用時，會為你開啟暫時的傳送門。

quest.4402F6855A75B7F6.quest_desc.original: This dungeon spawns in the lower parts of the &2Twilight Forest&r ring.
quest.4402F6855A75B7F6.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於&2暮光森林&r環帶的較低處。

quest.466E449BFD87E62F.quest_desc.original: The &cAncient Battleground&r can be found within the upper part of the &cNether&r ring.
quest.466E449BFD87E62F.quest_desc.translation: &c軍團前哨&r會出現於&c地獄&r環帶的較高處。

quest.4A2EB77748103124.quest_desc.original: This dungeon can be found in the &3Stone&r and &7Deepslate&r rings.
quest.4A2EB77748103124.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於&3石頭&r和&7深板岩&r環帶。

quest.4BB5ADD98F958712.quest_desc.original: This dungeon spawns in the &7Stone&r and &7Deepslate&r rings.
quest.4BB5ADD98F958712.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於&3石頭&r和&7深板岩&r環帶。

quest.4E623BAFD92591EE.quest_desc.original:
The &aStaff of Travelling&r is a powerful tool that allows you to teleport forward a short distance by Sneak + Right-clicking.

&aTravel Anchors&r allow you to set a waypoint that can be teleported to when holding the &aStaff of Travelling&r, so long as that block waypoint is within visible range.

&eNote&r: &aTravel Anchors&r require the &bFortron Infused Block&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r to craft.
quest.4E623BAFD92591EE.quest_desc.translation:
&a旅行權杖&r是一種強力工具，潛行並按下右鍵即可向前短距離傳送。

&a旅行錨&r可設定用於傳送的目標點。手持&a旅行權杖&r時，只要該錨點方塊在可視範圍內，就能傳送過去。

&e備註&r：製作&a旅行錨&r需要&b力場子注能方塊&r的&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.54A1D7A1D89C1A04.quest_desc.original: The &bFrosted Prison&r dungeon can be found in the upper parts of the &bOcean&r ring.
quest.54A1D7A1D89C1A04.quest_desc.translation: &b苦寒監牢&r會出現於&b海洋&r環帶的較高處。

quest.54B7D149B45635F4.quest_desc.original: The &dChronometer&r is a better version of the &aChronon Generator&r, passively producing more &bChronon&r than before.
quest.54B7D149B45635F4.quest_desc.translation: &d時空儀表&r是&a時空粒子產生器&r的強化版本，可被動生產比以往更多的&b時空粒子&r。

quest.575A111D4418BFB6.quest_desc.original:
The &6Metronome&r is the ultimate &bChronon&r generation tool.

You must provide it with about &b2000 Chronon&r to kickstart its production.

The &6Metronome&r has input and output slots that make it function as a &dChronon Battery&r, and it can link to other &6Metronomes&r on an internal network, which can also be set to private.

&eNote&f: The &6Metronome&r is &cNOT&f a reliable chronon storage for teleporting via the &aAction Pad&r.
quest.575A111D4418BFB6.quest_desc.translation:
&6節拍器&r是頂級的&b時空粒子&r生產裝置。

你必須先提供約 &b2000 時空粒子&r，才能啟動它的生產機制。

&6節拍器&r具備輸入與輸出欄位，可作為&d時空粒子電池&r使用；也能透過內部網路連結其他&6節拍器&r，並可設定為私人網路。

&e備註&f：&6節拍器&r&c不適合&f當作透過&a操作面板&r傳送時的可靠時空粒子儲存來源。

quest.61D55FA7CEA6F414.quest_desc.original: This dungeon can be found in the &dVoid Chasm&r ring.
quest.61D55FA7CEA6F414.quest_desc.translation: 此地牢會出現於&d虛空斷層&r環帶。

quest.634884134E2786B2.quest_desc.original:
The &dMalkuth Arena&r is a massive structure found within the &dVoid Chasms&r ring.

This arena comes with its own boss fight!
quest.634884134E2786B2.quest_desc.translation:
&d『王國』競技場&r是能夠在&d虛空斷層&r環帶中找到的大型結構。

此競技場內有一場專屬的魔王戰！

quest.6D28E1AFBB33C43E.quest_desc.original:
&eTime Steel&r is used to craft better versions of your existing devices, and a few new gadgets as well.

The &dChronon Battery&r is the first upgrade you should craft.

It can store much more &bChronon&r than the simple &aChronon Cell&r, and is also a crafting ingredient used in some of the more advanced &eTempad&r recipes.

&eNote&r: You must have the &eChroniton Glass&r and &aMachine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrades&r to craft this.
quest.6D28E1AFBB33C43E.quest_desc.translation:
&e時空鋼&r可用來製作現有裝置的強化版本，以及一些全新的裝置。

&d時空粒子電池&r是你應該優先製作的第一項升級。

它比基礎的&a時空粒子單元&r能儲存更多&b時空粒子&r，且也是部分進階《&e時空平板&r》配方的材料。

&e備註&r：製作前必須先取得&e時空粒子玻璃&r與&a世界引擎機器方塊&r&6升級&r。

quest.754ADB22C6B8041F.quest_desc.original:
This structure spawns in the lower &7Deepslate&r ring.

The &aWeeping Well&r will be needed to progress in &6Malum&r!

&eNote&r: You can also find the &aWeeping Well&r in the &dArcane Grove&r.
quest.754ADB22C6B8041F.quest_desc.translation:
此地牢會出現於&2深板岩&r環帶的下半部。

&a哭泣之井&r是推動&6《靈災》&r模組進展的必要結構！

&e備註&r：你也能夠在&d祕法源林&r中找到&a哭泣之井&r。

quest.78A644464D4C506A.quest_desc.original:
The &6Portal Gun&r is an incredibly fun gadget that can create portals for you to travel through. This does require power to function!

Left clicking will create a blue portal, while right clicking will create an orange portal. Traveling through either will send you to the other.

The &dAdvanced Portal Gun&r allows you to save locations to teleport to, provided it has power and &dPortal Fluid&r.

&eNote&r: To craft these, it requires the &bChroniton Glass&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r to craft.
quest.78A644464D4C506A.quest_desc.translation:
&6傳送槍&r是非常有趣的裝置，可建立供你穿越的傳送門，但需要能量才能運作！

左鍵會建立藍色傳送門，右鍵會建立橙色傳送門。穿越任一傳送門都會把你送到另一側位置。

&d進階傳送槍&r可儲存傳送位置；只要能量與&d傳送門流體&r充足，就能夠進行傳送。

&e備註&r：製作這些裝置需要&b時空玻璃粒子&r的&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.7B772A85691C60F5.quest_desc.original:
For each ring, there are 4 pre-built &dTelepads&r; one for each cardinal direction.

You might run into these as you dig out, but you can also buy &dEnder Shards&r that are linked to them from the &zShop&r!
quest.7B772A85691C60F5.quest_desc.translation:
每個環帶都預先建有 4 個&d傳送點&r結構，分別對應四個方位。

你從基地向外挖掘時可能會遇到它們；也可以在&z商店&r購買已連結這些傳送點的&d終界碎片&r！

quest.7C72E7E48CCA7BB1.quest_desc.original:
The &dAdvanced Dislocator&r allows you to store multiple warp points at once. It has infinite uses, but needs to be fueled by &dEnder Pearls&r to work.

To fuel it, open up the interface with Ender Pearls in your inventory, then click the + buttons at the bottom of the GUI to add them in as fuel.
quest.7C72E7E48CCA7BB1.quest_desc.translation:
&d進階傳送符咒&r可同時儲存多個傳送點。可無限次使用，但需要使用&d終界珍珠&r作為燃料。

要補充燃料，先在物品欄中放入終界珍珠，並開啟符咒介面，再按下介面底部的「+」按鈕來加入燃料。

quest.7DE9A4C7979AC1FA.quest_desc.original:
The &6Tempad&r allows you to open a door to any marked location.

It also allows you to manually add new locations via current coordinates, and has several configuration options. Pinned locations can be teleported to via keybinds.

&aLocation Cards&r can also be used in the Tempad interface to register or copy locations.

&eNote&f: The &6Tempad&r does &cNOT&f function as a chronon storage for teleporting via the &aAction Pad&r.
quest.7DE9A4C7979AC1FA.quest_desc.translation:
&6時空平板&r可讓你開啟通往任何已標記位置的時空門。

你也能透過目前座標手動新增位置，並調整多種設定；釘選的位置可透過快捷鍵快速傳送。

&a傳送點卡片&r也能在時空平板介面中，用於登錄或複製位置。

&e備註&f：&6時空平板&r&c不能&f作為使用&a操作面板&r傳送時的時空粒子儲存來源。
